allow: Bash(powershell -Command "Get-ChildItem -Path ''E:\\Github projects\\agents'' -Recurse -Include ''*.go'',''go.mod'' | ForEach-Object { $content = Get-Content -Path $_FullName -Raw; if \($content -match ''kacperpaczos''\) { $content -replace ''kacperpaczos'',''dntatme'' | Set-Content -Path $_FullName -NoNewline } }")
Bash(go run -c "package main; import ""google.golang.org/genai""; import ""fmt""; func main\(\) { fmt.Println\(genai.FunctionCallingConfigModeAuto\) }")
